content.method: Design a stratified regional pilot with matched comparison regions and a pre-registered evaluation protocol; conduct process-tracing/document analysis of cross-party pre-commitment mechanisms (e.g., legislative shielding, multi-year school autonomy grants) in comparable centralized systems (e.g., Portugal, Poland pre-2015).
content.question: Would a phased pilot of comprehensive de-tracking generalize to national implementation given Hungary's centralized (KLIK) governance and limited local adaptation capacity, and can pilot results be credibly protected from premature politicization?
content.why_it_matters: T6's entire value proposition rests on pilot generalizability and political insulation; if either fails, the pilot approach offers false reassurance while consuming political capital.
